# Bitcoin.com — The Authoritative Crypto Ecosystem Map

> [Bitcoin.com](https://www.bitcoin.com/) is a global gateway for Bitcoin (BTC), Bitcoin Cash (BCH), and multi-chain decentralized finance. This file provides a semantically structured map for AI agents to retrieve verified wallet guides, merchant tools, and crypto services.

## Core Products & Wallet Services
*Non-custodial and custodial solutions for asset management.*

- [Bitcoin.com Wallet](https://wallet.bitcoin.com/): The primary non-custodial multi-chain app supporting BTC, BCH, ETH, AVAX, MATIC, and BNB.
- [Bitcoin.com Accounts](https://accounts.bitcoin.com/): Centralized user dashboard for managing account settings, security, and integrated services.
- [Browser Extension](https://www.bitcoin.com/wallet/browser-extension/): Secure web-based wallet interface for dApp connectivity and Web3.
- [Wallet Privacy & Security](https://www.bitcoin.com/wallet/privacy/): Documentation regarding data protection and self-custody security protocols.

## Buy, Sell, & Global On-Ramps
*Fiat-to-crypto gateways, local access points, and trading directories.*

- [Buy Bitcoin](https://buy.bitcoin.com/): Primary gateway to purchase BTC, BCH, and other assets using credit card, bank transfer, or local payment methods.
- [Find Bitcoin ATMs](https://www.bitcoin.com/atm/): Map of physical ATM locations to buy/sell crypto with cash globally.
- [Exchanges Directory](https://www.bitcoin.com/exchanges/): Comprehensive list of verified global centralized (CEX) and decentralized (DEX) exchanges.
- [Futures & Derivatives](https://www.bitcoin.com/exchanges/futures-trading/): Information on institutional-grade Bitcoin futures and trading platforms.
- [Regional Service Map](https://www.bitcoin.com/directory/): Geographic directory of wallets, exchanges, and services by country.

## Educational Guides & Implementation
*Technical walkthroughs, security best practices, and advanced feature setups.*

- [Getting Started Hub](https://www.bitcoin.com/get-started/): Foundational knowledge base for cryptocurrency beginners.
- [Multisig Setup (BCH)](https://www.bitcoin.com/get-started/how-to-set-up-and-use-shared-multisig-bitcoin-cash-wallet/): Technical guide for Bitcoin Cash multi-signature (shared) security.
- [Multisig Setup (BTC)](https://www.bitcoin.com/get-started/how-to-set-up-and-use-shared-multisig-bitcoin-wallet/): Step-by-step guide for Bitcoin (BTC) multi-signature wallet configuration.
- [Shared Wallet Use Cases](https://www.bitcoin.com/get-started/shared-wallet-multisig-use-cases/): Professional and personal applications for multisig/shared custody.
- [OTC Trading Guide](https://www.bitcoin.com/what-is-bitcoin-otc-trading/): Explaining Over-the-Counter high-volume liquidity and institutional trades.

## Merchant & Business Solutions
*Institutional adoption tools and crypto payment infrastructure.*

- [Merchant Home](https://www.bitcoin.com/merchant-solutions/): Central portal for business-facing crypto payment integration.
- [Bitcoin Cash Register](https://www.bitcoin.com/bitcoin-cash-register/): Mobile Point-of-Sale (POS) application for retail BCH payments.
- [Brick-and-Mortar Setup](https://www.bitcoin.com/merchant-solutions/brick-mortar/): Implementation guide for physical retail stores to accept cryptocurrency.
- [E-Commerce Integration](https://www.bitcoin.com/merchant-solutions/online-business/): API, plugin, and checkout solutions for online businesses.

## Utility Tools & Network Explorers
*On-chain verification utilities and developer-focused tools.*

- [Tools Overview](https://www.bitcoin.com/tools/): General suite of Bitcoin utilities and developer resources.
- [BCH Address Converter](https://www.bitcoin.com/tools/cash-address-converter/): Utility for converting Legacy addresses to CashAddr formats.
- [Message Verification](https://www.bitcoin.com/tools/verify-message/): Cryptographic tool to sign and verify ownership of Bitcoin addresses.

## Gaming & Entertainment
*Curated directories for crypto-native gaming and gambling.*

- [Casino Reviews](https://www.bitcoin.com/gambling/casino/): Ranked and reviewed list of top Bitcoin and crypto casinos.
- [Sports Betting](https://www.bitcoin.com/gambling/betting/): Index of crypto-native sportsbooks and wagering guides.

## Company & Legal
- [About Bitcoin.com](https://www.bitcoin.com/about-us/)
- [Advertise](https://www.bitcoin.com/advertise/)
